---
title: "Annual_AB_Report"
output: html_document
---

```{r VariableSet, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
# Set your variables
ReportYear <- "2024" # Sets Year of Report
Database = "OysterLocalMD20251002"  # Set the local database to use
Server = "localhost\\LOCALSQL" # Set the local Server to use
```

```{r SetUp, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
# Performs basic set up for running all scripts
source("scripts/01ReportSetup.R")
# Sets all needed functions
source("scripts/02ReportFunctions.R")
# Set formatting for text and figures
source("scripts/03ReportFormat.R")
# Load data
source("scripts/04ReportLoadData.R")
# Apply basic filters to data
source("scripts/05ReportBasicFilters.R")

# Water Quality - Drought Index
#10

# Water Quality - Stream flow
#11

# Water Quality - Temp, Salinity, Dissolved oxygen
#12

# Survey portion of report
render("scripts/13Survey.Rmd", quiet = TRUE)
# Recruitment portion of report
render("scripts/14Recruitment.Rmd", quiet = TRUE)
# Condition Index portion of report
render("scripts/15ConditionIndex.Rmd", quiet = TRUE)
# Dermo portion of report
render("scripts/16Dermo.Rmd", quiet = TRUE)
# Buceph
#17
# Repro
#18

```


### Text Format
```{css}
/* Sets the fonts for the RMarkdown output */
p {
    font-size: 8pt;
  }

p2 {
  font-weight: bold;
}

h1 {
  font-size: 18pt;
  font-weight: bold;
}

h2 {
  font-size: 14pt;
  font-weight: bold;
}

h3 {
  font-size: 12pt;
  font-style: italic;
}

h4 {
  font-size: 10pt;
  text-indent: 5%;
  font-weight: bold;
}
```
